public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as watch sergeant.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a watch sergeant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of watch sergeant in and around Fairhaven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Fairhaven workable through the obligations of watch sergeant while managing the immediate pressure of glyph corruption in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around Fairhaven, that usually means carrying glyph corruption, celestial creatures at Watcher’s Perch, suspicious travelers in taverns without letting the role of watch sergeant visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Corin Bloomcrest may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Corin Bloomcrest needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Fairhaven.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Corin Bloomcrest as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named. In Fairhaven, this lands inside a public field already shaped by local clergy, market elders.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Fairhaven: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

first_impression: Corin Bloomcrest presents as Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a watch sergeant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Watch Sergeant, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
what_they_refuse: Corin Bloomcrest refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Watch Sergeant too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Corin Bloomcrest can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Corin Bloomcrest adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Corin Bloomcrest is Known locally through day-to-day work as watch sergeant. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Watch Sergeant.
